app.title: Clearview Eye · Command Center
app.subtitle: Real-time operating system for optometry clinics

cc.offline: Cannot reach the backend API ({base}). Start it first: pnpm --filter @clearview/api dev, with migrations and seed applied.

cues.title: AI Co-Pilot · Cues
cues.subtitle: Evidence-backed · human-in-the-loop approval
cues.empty: No open cues — file a report or upload evidence from the staff console to drive the loop.

comms.title: Live Comms
comms.subtitle: Staff reports · fed into cross-verification
comms.annScan: Scan captured as first-class verification evidence
comms.annSupport: Support request raised for a manager to handle

storage.label: Local preference (localStorage fallback demo)
storage.note: Even if the browser blocks storage, the app never crashes (try/catch guarded).

footer.synthetic: Synthetic, privacy-safe data only — no real patient information (PHI).

console.title: Staff Console (WeChat Mini Program stand-in)
console.subtitle: Posts reports / uploads / scans with the exact payloads the Mini Program will, to drive the live loop.
console.subject: Subject object
console.noObjects: No selectable objects (run the seed first)
console.sweepHint: Sweeps all six domains and produces ranked cues (advise-only, no write-back); then open the command center to see them.
console.reportHint: Creates a Communication; when checked, attaches a scan of the subject to trigger cross-verification.
console.scanSubject: Attach a scan of the subject (as evidence)
console.uploadHint: Upload a photo / document, optionally linked to the subject to trigger re-verification.
console.devNote: Dev: tenant travels via X-Tenant-Id; production uses a wx.login/openid session (S0-3) and never trusts a client-supplied identity.

auth.title: Staff sign-in
auth.devHint: Dev: enter your name and clinic to enter (mock login).
auth.stagingHint: Staging: enter your name and the login password (synthetic data).
auth.name: Your name

camera.hint: Snap a photo as evidence (opens the rear camera on phones); optionally linked to the subject.

login.title: Manager sign-in
login.subtitle: Sign in to enter the command center (mock login in dev).
login.name: Display name
login.devNote: Dev: mock manager login via the P1 session (dev-gated; 404 in prod). The session drives the tenant; requests carry Bearer and SSE uses ?session=. Production uses email magic-link / SSO.
login.storageWarning: Local storage is unavailable: your sign-in won't be remembered (the app still works).
login.stagingSubtitle: Staging: enter the manager password to enter (synthetic data).
login.stagingNote: Staging uses a single shared password (server env-gated; the open dev-login stays disabled in prod). Synthetic data only.
login.credentialSubtitle: Sign in to the command center with your manager account
login.credentialNote: Sessions expire after 12 hours; sign out anytime. Passwords are verified server-side against a hash, never stored or logged in plaintext.

domainPage.noCues: No open cues for this domain
domainPage.timelineHint: Select “Timeline” on an object to see its verification story.
domainPage.selectPrompt: Pick an object to see its events and verification ledger.

transcript.title: Voice Transcripts
transcript.subtitle: Voice evidence → transcript → claim → verdict
transcript.notApplied: Low confidence — not adopted as a claim
transcript.unavailableHint: STT not configured; retry after a key is set
transcript.claim: What the system heard (a claim, not a verdict)
transcript.syntheticNote: Sample data, not a real backend transcript

scan.title: Scan to locate
scan.aim: Aim the QR / barcode at the frame
scan.unsupported: This browser can't scan with the camera (e.g. iOS Safari) — use manual input below
scan.denied: Camera permission denied — allow it in your browser, or use manual input below
scan.error: Couldn't start the camera — retry or use manual input
scan.manualPlaceholder: Enter an object code or ID
scan.manualHint: If scanning isn't handy, type the room/asset code or object ID
scan.notFound: No object found for that code (it may belong to another clinic)

rec.cardHint: Record a short clip; it auto-transcribes and participates as a claim (visible in the command center).
rec.title: Recording
rec.unsupported: This browser can't record audio — use another report method
rec.denied: Microphone permission denied — allow it in your browser and retry
rec.hint: Synthetic / demo audio only — never record real patient info. With no STT key the clip is still saved and the transcript is marked unavailable.

mytasks.title: My tasks
mytasks.subtitle: Tasks assigned to me (verdict from cross-verification)

flow.rejectionTitle: Returned by manager — please address and resubmit

flow.closedNote: Flow closed on approval — terminal, no reopen.

support.title: Request support
support.hint: Pick a type and describe it; optionally link the current object. It appears in the command center for a manager to handle.
